title: Baby Villagers
description: This packs adds a different texture for Baby Villagers.
body:
![BABY VILLAGERS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bc9ab9ddce09bfcadc70c0b54d16ada434f6d72.png)

#

This pack change the face texture of Baby Villagers and Baby Zombie Villagers

The textures come from *Fresh Animation*, I just edited it to work without F.A.

# Dependencies

### REQUIRED MOD (you need one of the 2 options below)
- [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

### KNOWN COMPATIBLE PACKS (with advised order for the packs)
1. [Working Armorers](https://modrinth.com/project/working-armorers)
2. [Zombie Villager Gloves](https://modrinth.com/project/zombie-villager-gloves)
3. [Villagolems Classic](https://modrinth.com/project/villagolems-classic)
4. [Villagolems Swapped](https://modrinth.com/project/villagolems-swapped)
5. [Sleeping Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/sleeping-villagers)
6. [ Baby Villagers ]
7. [Unique Spawn Eggs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-13-1-16-unique-spawn-eggs)

/!\ Some packs in this list aren't compatible with each other /!\

### KNOWN UNCOMPATIBLE PACKS
- Fresh Villagolems
- Fresh Sleeping Villagers
- Fresh Animations Extensions
- Fresh Animations
- Villager Variety

# External Credit
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)

#

- You can use this pack in any video or image freely.
- If you want to republish it, please give credit to my [Modrinth profile](https://modrinth.com/user/LeFizolof). You don't need to ask me but there must be a significant change.
- /!\ You also have to respect the conditions of the credited creator above. /!\
